text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 212 

MISG_ELGBLTY_DATA_IND 

LABEL: Indicator of Missing Eligibility Record for All Months of Service Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that the person had claims for the year but no eligibility information. 

SHORT NAME: MISG_ELGBLTY_DATA_IND 

LONG NAME: MISG_ELGBLTY_DATA_IND 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic
